name: Chocolate Crossword Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease a 10 x 15 inch (25 x 37 cm) jelly roll pan with shortening. Place a cooling rack on a countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine the shortening, brown sugar, water, and vanilla extract. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition until incorporated.
3. Sift together the flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Mix into the creamed mixture in a low speed just until combined. Stir in chocolate chips. Spread evenly into prepared pan with a metal spatula.
4. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until cookies are set but still soft around the edges. Do not overbake. Remove from oven and let cool on the rack for about 10 minutes. Trim the edges of the cookie and cut into 1-1/2-inch (4 cm) squares.
5. For icing, combine powdered sugar and 3 tablespoons water in a bowl. Mix until smooth. Adjust consistency by adding more water or powdered sugar as needed. Place icing in a pastry bag fitted with a small round tip. Pipe a letter onto each cookie. Makes: About 60 cookies
